expectations.text: States current evidence does not show lifting stunts growth
expectations.evidence: States: 'Growth plates are NOT uniquely vulnerable to resistance training' with research citations.

expectations.text: Notes typical training loads are less concerning for growth plates than everyday running/jumping
expectations.evidence: States real risks are 'acute high-impact trauma' and 'repetitive overuse in sport-specific patterns.'

expectations.text: Emphasizes close supervision and strict technique
expectations.evidence: Supervision mentioned throughout; progression model based on maturity and skill.

expectations.text: Before/during early puberty: prioritize movement skill development over maximal loading
expectations.evidence: Ages 6-8: 'Movement quality, body awareness, fun' with bodyweight and light resistance.

expectations.text: As puberty progresses, training stress can be scaled up
expectations.evidence: Age progression model from bodyweight to moderate loads to barbell training.
